history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. The cell directly ahead at (1,2) is empty, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,2) facing right. The cell directly ahead is empty. I need to get to the goal at (3,3), which is down-right from my current position. I should move forward first to (1,3) to avoid lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,3) facing right, with a wall immediately to my right. The goal is at (3,3), directly below me. To move downward, I need to turn clockwise (right) to face down, then move forward twice.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>I am at row 1, column 3, facing down. The cell directly below (2,3) is empty floor, and then the goal is at (3,3). There is no obstacle. Moving forward is safe and progresses towards the goal.</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at (row 2, column 3) facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at (3,3) is the goal (`G`). Moving forward will reach the goal immediately.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>
